6314 Caenen Lake Rd, Shawnee, KS 66216, USA

A bunch of Chinese crabapple trees surrounding the natural grocers parking lot. Possibly also the burger king parking lot. Very tiny but good for making apple tea or possibly different kinds of canning. May want to ask natural grocers before picking Access: Pr
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

The orchard will be used to help feed those in need. Members of the church will help with the orchard upkeep. Orchard includes apples, Asian pears, Euro pears, jujubes, and bus
